description: Sends channel messages, direct notifications, and updates to Slack.

setupGuide.title: Setting up Slack Notifications
setupGuide.summary: You can send Slack messages using an Incoming Webhook or a Bot User OAuth Token.
steps: Go to api.slack.com/apps and create a new Slack App for your workspace.
Enable 'Incoming Webhooks' or add the 'chat:write' bot permission scope.
Copy your Webhook URL or Bot Token and paste it into Qonace!
